name: Garbanzo Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the cooked garbanzo beans.
2. Mix all of the ingredients together in a blender.
3. Add water or bean-cooking liquid as needed to achieve a creamy consistency.
HELPFUL HINTS: Let stand at room temperature for an hour to blend flavors. Use this spread on sandwiches, to fill pita bread pockets, or as a dip for crackers and pita.
